name: actual-budget
tagline: A privacy-focused personal budgeting app with offline-first data control
description: Actual is a privacy-focused personal budgeting and finance manager with offline-first architecture. It allows local data control, multi-device sync, budgeting categories, transaction tracking, and report generation. Designed to be self-hosted.

features.title: Personal Budgeting
features.description: Manages income, expenses, and account balances over time

features.title: Envelope Budgeting
features.description: Allocates funds into categories to control spending

features.title: Local-First Data Model
features.description: Stores financial data primarily on the user device

features.title: Multi-Device Sync
features.description: Synchronizes budgets across devices using a server

features.title: Import and Export
features.description: Supports importing transactions from external financial files
